doctrine: Every capsule is a card. Every card is a component. The card record is canonical — print, NFT, and game state derive from it.

card_schema.name: string · all caps
card_schema.role: enum · SOURCE | STORE | TRANSFORM | ROUTE | GUARD | SINK | ATTRACTOR
card_schema.ports_in: string[] · port types this card accepts
card_schema.ports_out: string[] · port types this card emits
card_schema.art_ref: string · path to the capsule render
card_schema.back_ref: string · path to shared back art

nft.metadata: object · derived deterministically from this record

physical.finish: spot UV on glyph + serial, foil on rarity badge

founding_deck.name: EDITION 01 · THE SEALED CHANNEL
founding_deck.composition: 3 cards per NAV (9 NAVs in canonical core × 3 = 27). The expanded NAV-10..18 ship in EDITION 02.
founding_deck.tuck_box: milled aluminum sleeve in NAV chassis silhouette, hex-screw clasp

cards.name: VOID GENESIS
cards.ability: At start of chain, place 1 TICK on every capsule you control.
cards.flavor: Before the Channel, only the Void. NAV-01 is the moment after.

cards.name: EMBER FORGE
cards.ability: Convert 1 POWER into 1 DATA + 1 POWER. May overheat once per chain.
cards.flavor: Where the Forge burns, the Channel takes shape.

cards.name: JADE LATTICE
cards.ability: Hold up to 3 DATA tokens between chains. Tokens never expire.
cards.flavor: Order remembers itself in the Lattice.

cards.name: COBALT TIDELINE
cards.ability: Phase-shift: at end of chain, advance one routed token by 1 edge.
cards.flavor: The tide does not push. The tide arranges.

cards.name: VIOLET ORACLE
cards.ability: Look at the top 3 cards of the Channel. Place 1 on top, 1 on bottom, keep 1.
cards.flavor: The Oracle sees the next tick before it arrives.

cards.name: BONE CIPHER
cards.ability: Counter the next non-MYTHIC card played against your chain.
cards.flavor: The Cipher remembers every key it has ever seen.

cards.name: GOLD CROWN
cards.ability: Only chains sealed by the Crown score for the round. One per deck.
cards.flavor: What the Crown does not seal, the Channel does not carry.

cards.name: AMBER FIXED-POINT
cards.ability: Every chain you control resolves at NAV-08. Score = sum of yields in chain.
cards.flavor: The fix-point is amber. The amber is the Archive.

cards.name: IRIDESCENT NULL
cards.ability: Close a chain without scoring. Opponent draws no card from this chain.
cards.flavor: The Null is not an absence. It is a deliberate end.

cards.name: COBALT CELL
cards.ability: Provide 2 POWER each chain. Discharges after 3 chains; recharge by resting 1 round.
cards.flavor: Power without a story is still power.

cards.name: MERCURY CLOCK
cards.ability: Generate 1 TICK each chain. TICKs are required to fire MYTHIC abilities.
cards.flavor: The Clock keeps the Channel honest.

cards.name: JADE MEMORY
cards.ability: Store 1 card from your hand face-down. Recall any time for free.
cards.flavor: What the Lattice contemplates, the Memory holds.

cards.name: COPPER ANTENNA
cards.ability: Reveal the top card of opponent's deck each chain.
cards.flavor: The sky is full of voices. The Antenna picks one.

cards.name: ONYX VALVE
cards.ability: Throttle: cap routed yield at 3 for one chain.
cards.flavor: Some flows are not denied. They are slowed.

cards.name: QUARTZ LENS
cards.ability: Focus: double the yield of the next SIGNAL card in the chain.
cards.flavor: What the Antenna gathers, the Lens decides.

cards.name: IRON GATE
cards.ability: Choose AND/OR/XOR on two incoming DATA. Output applies the chosen op.
cards.flavor: The Gate has only two answers. Use them well.

cards.name: PLATINUM CONDUIT
cards.ability: Carry up to 3 different port types in parallel. May appear twice in one chain.
cards.flavor: The Conduit is the Channel made literal.

cards.name: BASALT ANCHOR
cards.ability: Ground excess: prevent next overload damage to your chain.
cards.flavor: Without the Anchor, the Channel would tear itself apart.

chain_to_card_minting.rule: Any complete chain (per connectors.json R5-CLOSURE) mints a Compound Card.

compound_card.rarity: derived from sum of constituent rarities

nft.metadata: { chain: [...], constituents: [...], minted_at: ts, sealed_by: NAV-08 }
